summary: Made two surgical seam adjustments: rewrote the opening paragraph to avoid mirroring the adjacent chapter's temporal-clause entry, and aligned the clinic location with the next chapter's across-town continuity.
edits: Reframed the opening around the trophy case and office threshold instead of a 'By the time' temporal construction.
Changed the clinic location from three blocks away to across town so the chapter 13 handoff remains continuous.
